feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Through Ash and Time
entry.summary:
Author: PaperYue_8

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,875Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 102

Summary: Stiles Stilinski wakes up in the past with the weight of a future he refuses to let happen. The Hale fire, the deaths, the betrayals—he remembers it all. But fate isn’t so easily rewritten. Armed with knowledge, untamed power, and a sharp tongue, Stiles must navigate a past that isn’t quite how he remembers it. Derek Hale watches him too closely, Lydia Martin hears whispers of something *wrong*, and even Scott senses the shift in his best friend. The Nemeton isn’t done with him, and neither is the past. Stiles came back to save them—but the more he changes, the more reality bends around him. And he’s not sure if he's fixing things… or breaking them beyond repair. DISCONTINUED

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,986Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 156

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,112Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 163

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,048Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 272

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Rainbow Springs
entry.summary:
Author: Zelena_Fey

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,186Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Derek's life is small and safe. A pilot who stays in hotels, avoids risk, keeps the world at arm's length. Then he finds a journal that belongs to Stiles, a stranger whose pages are filled with fearless choices, spontaneous hikes, travel, and living. When he learns Stiles is a flight attendant and overhears him mentioning Rainbow Springs, Derek makes an unusual choice: follow him there. He needs to meet him.

entry.title: As Old As Time
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,479Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: The Hale estate has been silent for ten years. The village doesn't ask why. Stiles asks anyway. A Sterek Beauty and the Beast AU. Derek is the Beast. His family is the furniture. The rose is dying. And the sheriff's kid with the big mouth and the bigger heart isn't going anywhere.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,624Chapters: 1/40Kudos: 4

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is not complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,083Chapters: 9/11Kudos: 144

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: Just Trust Me, You'll Be Fine
entry.summary:
Author: PigeonTheSmol

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,827Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 414

Summary: “Drop your stuff at the door, Huckleberry,” Santos called over her shoulder as she opened the door to her apartment. She hung her coat and bag on a peg by the door and yelled into the apartment, “California! Make sure you got pants on! We got a new roommate!” From the kitchen, a male voice yelled back, “Already pantsed, Trin!” *** The events of Season 1 of The Pitt go the same as they do in the show, but when Dennis gets to Trinity's place there's an additional roommate. Stiles and Dennis become fast friends but both are hiding secrets about why they keep avoiding talking about home. One day a man comes into The Pitt with a bullet lodged into his side and when they check his emergency contact, it's Stiles. But what's more concerning to Dennis is that he recognises the bullet.   (Title and some chapter titles taken from End of Beginning by Djo and other songs that I'll credit in each chapter)

entry.title: When Death Opened His Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: GrimReaperlover11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,825Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Archeologist Derek Hale makes the discovery of a lifetime, a buried Aztec temple to the god of death. But when he brings an artifact back to the states...he is thrown into the middle of a supernatural journey that he was not prepared for but now must live through.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Five Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,275Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: Single Parent, Multiple Problems [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: CrimsonMoonn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: A recording of 'Single Parent, Multiple Problems' Derek tries really hard to do the right thing, Stiles thinks Derek's idea of the right thing is the wrong thing, and John does his best to help. "Is, uh--is Stiles home?" Hale is staring at the ground and his shoulders are so tense that John's tempted to say 'Boo!' just to see what'll happen.

entry.title: Wake Me Back to You
entry.summary:
Author: bubbyhanbroski_halenstein419

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,280Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 62

Summary: Derek is finally happy. Stiles can’t let him stay that way. And that might be the cruelest thing he’s ever done.
